title: Resonance+
body:
This modpack is meant to enhance minecraft. Dial it up to 11.
I went around and grabbed many performance, and vanilla+ mods.
I've done my best so you can have a refreshing and beautiful experience,
without losing the charming vanilla feel. Links to all the mods involved are below:

https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yungs-bridges-fabric 
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yungs-better-mineshafts-fabric 
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yungs-better-dungeons-fabric 
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yungs-extras-fabric
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/yungs-better-strongholds-fabric
https://modrinth.com/mod/adorn
https://modrinth.com/mod/alternate-current
https://modrinth.com/mod/iris
https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium
https://modrinth.com/mod/blur-fabric
https://modrinth.com/mod/charmonium
https://modrinth.com/mod/cull-leaves
https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify
https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe
https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin
https://modrinth.com/mod/feature-nbt-deadlock-be-gone
https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core
https://modrinth.com/mod/homabric
https://modrinth.com/mod/indium
https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton
https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdabettergrass
https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights
https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu
https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling
https://modrinth.com/mod/puddles
https://modrinth.com/mod/qsl
https://modrinth.com/mod/sandwichable
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/terralith
https://modrinth.com/mod/this-rocks
https://modrinth.com/mod/totally-lit
https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality

It took me a while to put all of the links down, sorry.
